plan_under_test: The output-integrity audit detects duplicate image-path mappings across records while ignoring repeated aliases inside one record.
tests_added_or_changed: Add a targeted current-output-integrity test with two records sharing one question image path and one mark-scheme image path.
Assert duplicate_question_image_path and duplicate_mark_scheme_image_path failure groups, counts, and duplicate_key evidence.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the new duplicate-path assertions should fail because only duplicate question_id and paper/question pairs are checked.
what_passing_proves: Cross-record shared canonical image paths are surfaced as integrity failures.
The audit deduplicates repeated image fields inside a single record before counting path mappings.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove that every duplicate path is semantically wrong; auditors still need to inspect candidates.
It does not detect byte-identical duplicate files at different paths; storage_audit owns exact content duplicates.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The fixture uses real per-record path fields and existing integrity-bank helpers.
